Off Calendar Nov-10-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances):

Chris Sullivan, Esq. 415-691-4518 Sullivan Blackburn Pratt for Defendant Bittles et al.

Hearing is held at 10:30am. The Court announces he did not see an Opposition filed. Mr. Chemerinski states he did not file an Opposition. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

COMPLIANCE HEARING.

The Court grants the preliminary injunction in the manner presented. Mr. Sims informs parties of the slight modification in the proposed order. Preliminary Injunction is signed in Open Court. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/HEK)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Dismissal And Set Compliance Hearing
Off Calendar Oct-17-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Atty. Hunter Sims III, Esq. of the City of San Francisco's Attorney's Office (tel: 415-554-4259) for the Plaintiffs.
Atty. Eliel Chemerinski, Esq. of Law Offices of Eliel Chemerinski (tel: 818-990-9977) for Defendant Abdulrahman Almehdhar and Discount Markeet Inc. dba SF Discount Market.

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFFS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AND PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DISMISSAL.

Matter discussed. The Court grants the motion and sets aside the dismissal. Counsel Hunter Sims III is to prepare and submit a proposed order.

Counsel Eliel Chemerinski states he is not prepared for the compliance hearing today and requests a continuance to give defendants and opportunity to file an opposition.

Upon conclusion, the Court continues the matter for further briefing on the compliance hearing. Defendants' opposition is due on October 29, 2025. Plaintiff's brief is due on November 5, 2025. The matter is hereby continued for a compliance hearing to November 10, 2025, at 10:30 AM in department 302 to be heard by Judge Harold Kahn.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: V. da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/HEK)
